name: concept-explainer
description: Standalone HTML concept explainer for research/learning output: an intuition lead, a plain-prose mechanics section, a worked example, and a sidebar of further-reading pointers. Zero-JS: the reference's interactive ring demo and hover-glossary are reduced to static prose + a further-reading list.

slots.description: Concept name; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. topic area.
The one-sentence mental model, framed against the naive approach.
Plain-prose explanation of how the concept works and what it trades off.
A small worked example that makes the concept concrete.
Pointers to follow next; one sidebar entry each.
A single further-reading pointer (the repeated list item).
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
